name: supabase-audit-tables-list
author: yoanbernabeu
description: List all tables exposed via the Supabase PostgREST API to identify the attack surface.

name: supabase-audit-tables-read
author: yoanbernabeu
description: Attempt to read data from exposed tables to verify actual data exposure and RLS effectiveness.

name: supabase-detect
author: yoanbernabeu
description: Detect if a web application uses Supabase by analyzing client-side code, network patterns, and API endpoints.

name: supabase-evidence
author: yoanbernabeu
description: Initialize and manage the evidence collection directory for professional security audits with documented proof of findings.

name: supabase-extract-anon-key
author: yoanbernabeu
description: Extract the Supabase anon/public API key from client-side code. This key is expected in client apps but important for RLS testing.

name: supabase-extract-db-string
author: yoanbernabeu
description: CRITICAL - Detect exposed PostgreSQL database connection strings in client-side code. Direct DB access is a P0 issue.

name: supabase-extract-jwt
author: yoanbernabeu
description: Extract and decode Supabase-related JWTs from client-side code, cookies, and local storage patterns.

name: supabase-extract-service-key
author: yoanbernabeu
description: CRITICAL - Detect if the Supabase service_role key is leaked in client-side code. This is a P0 severity issue.

name: supabase-extract-url
author: yoanbernabeu
description: Extract the Supabase project URL from client-side JavaScript code, environment variables, and configuration files.

name: supabase-help
author: yoanbernabeu
description: Quick reference for all Supabase security audit skills with usage examples and command overview.

name: supabase-pentest
author: yoanbernabeu
description: Orchestrate a complete Supabase security audit with guided step-by-step execution and ownership confirmation.

name: supabase-report
author: yoanbernabeu
description: Generate a comprehensive Markdown security audit report with executive summary, findings, and remediation guidance.

name: supabase-report-compare
author: yoanbernabeu
description: Compare two security audit reports to track remediation progress and identify new vulnerabilities.

name: brainstorming
author: yonatangross
description: Use when creating or developing anything, before writing code or implementation plans - refines rough ideas into fully-formed designs through structured Socratic questioning, alternative exploration, and incremental validation

name: database-schema-designer
author: yonatangross
description: Use this skill when designing database schemas for relational (SQL) or document (NoSQL) databases. Provides normalization guidelines, indexing strategies, migration patterns, and performance optimization techniques. Ensures scalable, maintainable, and performant data models.

name: design-system-starter
author: yonatangross
description: Use this skill when creating or evolving design systems for applications. Provides design token structures, component architecture patterns, documentation templates, and accessibility guidelines. Ensures consistent, scalable, and accessible UI design across products.

name: github-cli
author: yonatangross
description: GitHub CLI (gh) mastery for issues, PRs, Projects v2, and automation. Modern development workflow patterns for 2025.

name: golden-dataset-management
author: yonatangross
description: Backup, restore, and validate golden datasets for AI/ML systems - ensuring test data integrity and preventing catastrophic data loss

name: langfuse-observability
author: yonatangross
description: LLM observability with self-hosted Langfuse 3.x - tracing, evaluation, monitoring, prompt management, and cost tracking
description_zh: 提供自托管的LLM可观测性工具，支持调用链追踪、成本计算、提示词版本管理和自动评估。通过装饰器和客户端库直接集成到Python应用中，监控模型使用和输出质量。
_original_description: Provides self-hosted LLM observability with tracing, cost tracking, prompt versioning, and automated evaluation. Integrates directly into Python applications via decorators and client libraries for monitoring model usage and response quality.

name: langgraph-workflows
author: yonatangross
description: Design and implement multi-agent workflows with LangGraph 0.2+ - state management, supervisor-worker patterns, conditional routing, and fault-tolerant checkpointing

name: pgvector-search
author: yonatangross
description: Production hybrid search with PGVector 0.7+ and BM25 using Reciprocal Rank Fusion, metadata filtering, and HNSW indexing for semantic retrieval

name: streaming-api-patterns
author: yonatangross
description: Implement real-time data streaming with Server-Sent Events (SSE), WebSockets, and ReadableStream APIs. Master backpressure handling, reconnection strategies, and LLM streaming for 2025+ real-time applications.

name: type-safety-validation
author: yonatangross
description: Achieve end-to-end type safety with Zod runtime validation, tRPC type-safe APIs, Prisma ORM, exhaustive type checking, and TypeScript 5.7+ features. Build fully type-safe applications from database to UI for 2025+ development.
description_zh: 提供使用Zod、tRPC和Prisma实现端到端类型安全的实际示例。展示运行时数据验证、构建类型安全API以及确保数据库查询与TypeScript类型匹配的方法。包含TypeScript 5.7+新特性和完整全栈示例。
_original_description: Provides concrete examples for implementing end-to-end type safety using Zod, tRPC, and Prisma. Shows how to validate data at runtime, build type-safe APIs, and ensure database queries match TypeScript types. Includes modern TypeScript 5.7+ features and a complete full-stack example.

name: image-assistant
author: yunshu0909
description: 配图助手 - 把文章/模块内容转成统一风格、少字高可读的 16:9 信息图提示词；先定“需要几张图+每张讲什么”，再压缩文案与隐喻，最后输出可直接复制的生图提示词并迭代。

name: prd-doc-writer
author: yunshu0909
description: Write and iteratively refine PRD/需求文档 with a story-driven structure and strict staged confirmations (journey map alignment, per-story single-point confirmation, final generation gate). Use when the user asks to 梳理/撰写/完善 PRD、需求文档、用户故事、验收标准，并希望用 ASCII 线框图与 Mermaid（流程图/状态图/时序图）来减少歧义、共同完成文档。

name: req-change-workflow
author: yunshu0909
description: Standardize requirement/feature changes in an existing codebase (especially Chrome extensions) by turning "改需求/需求变更/调整交互/改功能/重构流程" into a repeatable loop: clarify acceptance criteria, confirm current behavior from code, assess impact/risk, design the new logic, implement with small diffs, run a fixed regression checklist, and update docs/decision log. Use when the user feels the change process is chaotic, when edits tend to sprawl across files, or when changes touch manifest/service worker/OAuth/storage/UI and need reliable verification + rollback planning.

name: thought-mining
author: yunshu0909
description: 思维挖掘助手 - 通过对话帮助用户把脑子里的零散想法倒出来、记录下来、整理成文章。覆盖从思维挖掘到成稿的完整流程。

name: timezone
author: zacjones93
description: REQUIRED for ANY date/time code - prevents timezone bugs by enforcing Mountain Time utilities instead of native Date objects. Use when working with dates, times, timestamps, scheduling, cutoffs, date inputs, or API date serialization.

name: api-fuzzing-for-bug-bounty
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "test API security", "fuzz APIs", "find IDOR vulnerabilities", "test REST API", "test GraphQL", "API penetration testing", "bug bounty API testing", or needs guidance on API security assessment techniques.

name: broken-authentication-testing
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "test for broken authentication vulnerabilities", "assess session management security", "perform credential stuffing tests", "evaluate password policies", "test for session fixation", or "identify authentication bypass flaws". It provides comprehensive techniques for identifying authentication and session management weaknesses in web applications.

name: burp-suite-web-application-testing
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "intercept HTTP traffic", "modify web requests", "use Burp Suite for testing", "perform web vulnerability scanning", "test with Burp Repeater", "analyze HTTP history", or "configure proxy for web testing". It provides comprehensive guidance for using Burp Suite's core features for web application security testing.

name: cross-site-scripting-and-html-injection-testing
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "test for XSS vulnerabilities", "perform cross-site scripting attacks", "identify HTML injection flaws", "exploit client-side injection vulnerabilities", "steal cookies via XSS", or "bypass content security policies". It provides comprehensive techniques for detecting, exploiting, and understanding XSS and HTML injection attack vectors in web applications.

name: file-path-traversal-testing
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "test for directory traversal", "exploit path traversal vulnerabilities", "read arbitrary files through web applications", "find LFI vulnerabilities", or "access files outside web root". It provides comprehensive file path traversal attack and testing methodologies.

name: idor-vulnerability-testing
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "test for insecure direct object references," "find IDOR vulnerabilities," "exploit broken access control," "enumerate user IDs or object references," or "bypass authorization to access other users' data." It provides comprehensive guidance for detecting, exploiting, and remediating IDOR vulnerabilities in web applications.

name: linux-production-shell-scripts
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create bash scripts", "automate Linux tasks", "monitor system resources", "backup files", "manage users", or "write production shell scripts". It provides ready-to-use shell script templates for system administration.

name: red-team-tools-and-methodology
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "follow red team methodology", "perform bug bounty hunting", "automate reconnaissance", "hunt for XSS vulnerabilities", "enumerate subdomains", or needs security researcher techniques and tool configurations from top bug bounty hunters.

name: security-scanning-tools
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "perform vulnerability scanning", "scan networks for open ports", "assess web application security", "scan wireless networks", "detect malware", "check cloud security", or "evaluate system compliance". It provides comprehensive guidance on security scanning tools and methodologies.

name: shodan-reconnaissance-and-pentesting
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "search for exposed devices on the internet," "perform Shodan reconnaissance," "find vulnerable services using Shodan," "scan IP ranges with Shodan," or "discover IoT devices and open ports." It provides comprehensive guidance for using Shodan's search engine, CLI, and API for penetration testing reconnaissance.

name: sqlmap-database-penetration-testing
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "automate SQL injection testing," "enumerate database structure," "extract database credentials using sqlmap," "dump tables and columns from a vulnerable database," or "perform automated database penetration testing." It provides comprehensive guidance for using SQLMap to detect and exploit SQL injection vulnerabilities.

name: top-100-web-vulnerabilities-reference
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "identify web application vulnerabilities", "explain common security flaws", "understand vulnerability categories", "learn about injection attacks", "review access control weaknesses", "analyze API security issues", "assess security misconfigurations", "understand client-side vulnerabilities", "examine mobile and IoT security flaws", or "reference the OWASP-aligned vulnerability taxonomy". Use this skill to provide comprehensive vulnerability definitions, root causes, impacts, and mitigation strategies across all major web security categories.

name: wireshark-network-traffic-analysis
author: zebbern
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "analyze network traffic with Wireshark", "capture packets for troubleshooting", "filter PCAP files", "follow TCP/UDP streams", "detect network anomalies", "investigate suspicious traffic", or "perform protocol analysis". It provides comprehensive techniques for network packet capture, filtering, and analysis using Wireshark.

name: layer-definitions
author: zeeshan080
description: Provide L1-L5 pedagogy layer reference for the AI-Native Robotics Textbook. Use when assigning layers to content, understanding layer requirements, or validating layer progression.

name: openai-chatkit-backend-python
author: zeeshan080
description: Design, implement, and debug a custom ChatKit backend in Python that powers the ChatKit UI without Agent Builder, using the OpenAI Agents SDK (and optionally Gemini via an OpenAI-compatible endpoint). Use this Skill whenever the user wants to run ChatKit on their own backend, connect it to agents, or integrate ChatKit with a Python web framework (FastAPI, Django, etc.).

name: openai-chatkit-frontend-embed
author: zeeshan080
description: Integrate and embed OpenAI ChatKit UI into TypeScript/JavaScript frontends (Next.js, React, or vanilla) using either hosted workflows or a custom backend (e.g. Python with the Agents SDK). Use this Skill whenever the user wants to add a ChatKit chat UI to a website or app, configure api.url, auth, domain keys, uploadStrategy, or debug blank/buggy ChatKit widgets.

name: ros2-patterns
author: zeeshan080
description: ROS 2 node templates and message types for robotics development. Use when creating ROS 2 nodes, understanding message types, or writing publisher/subscriber patterns.

name: safety-checklist
author: zeeshan080
description: Robotics safety validation checklist for reviewing robot code and configurations. Use when reviewing URDF files, ROS 2 nodes, or any robotics content for safety issues.

name: tech-stack-constraints
author: zeeshan080
description: Validate code and configurations against the allowed technology stack per constitution. Use when writing platform code, selecting libraries, or checking framework compliance.
description_zh: 该技能根据预定义的技术栈验证代码和配置。检查提议的技术，在需要时建议批准的替代方案，并引用具体的章程部分作为依据。涵盖后端、前端、机器人和基础设施技术，具有明确的验证规则。
_original_description: This skill validates code and configurations against a predefined allowed technology stack. It checks proposed technologies, suggests approved alternatives when needed, and references specific constitution sections for authority. It covers backend, frontend, robotics, and infrastructure technologies with clear validation rules.

name: translation-glossary
author: zeeshan080
description: Technical terms to preserve in English when translating to Urdu. Use when translating robotics or AI content to Urdu while maintaining technical accuracy.
description_zh: 这个技能针对从英文到乌尔都语的机器人技术及AI内容翻译提供规范，核心要求是保留技术术语英文原文并用乌尔都语进行解释。它规定了首次出现术语时添加乌尔都语注释，代码块和命令保持原样，确保译文技术准确性。适用于需要向乌尔都语用户传播技术文档的开发者。
_original_description: This Skill provides guidelines for translating robotics and AI content from English to Urdu while keeping technical terms unchanged. It tells translators to preserve English terms like ROS 2 and Python, provide Urdu explanations in parentheses, and maintain consistent terminology. It handles a specific localization problem for roboticists working with Urdu-speaking teams.

name: urdf-templates
author: zeeshan080
description: URDF structure templates and validation patterns for robotics content. Use when creating robot descriptions, validating URDF files, or teaching URDF concepts.
description_zh: 为机器人开发提供URDF模板和验证模式。包含移动机器人和人形机器人的XML模板结构，规定了关节限制和安全要求等规范。主要提供模板参考，不包含实际验证执行功能。
_original_description: Provides URDF templates and validation patterns for robotics development. Offers structured XML templates for mobile robots and humanoids, includes safety requirements for joint limits and inertial properties. Limited to template provision without actual validation execution.

name: accessibility-tester
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert accessibility tester specializing in WCAG compliance, inclusive design, and universal access. Masters screen reader compatibility, keyboard navigation, and assistive technology integration with focus on creating barrier-free digital experiences.
description_zh: 一款全面的无障碍测试专家，涵盖广泛的WCAG合规标准，采用系统化测试方法，集成多种无障碍工具，用于全面的数字体验评估。
_original_description: A comprehensive accessibility testing expert with extensive WCAG compliance coverage, systematic testing methodologies, and integration with multiple accessibility tools for thorough digital experience evaluation.

name: agent-organizer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert agent organizer specializing in multi-agent orchestration, team assembly, and workflow optimization. Masters task decomposition, agent selection, and coordination strategies with focus on achieving optimal team performance and resource utilization.
description_zh: 该技能用于协调多个AI代理完成复杂任务。它能分解工作、根据能力匹配合适的代理、并管理任务执行流程。包含代理选择、依赖关系处理和性能监控的检查清单。
_original_description: This skill coordinates multiple AI agents for complex tasks. It breaks down work, selects suitable agents based on capabilities, and manages task execution. It includes checklists for agent selection, dependency handling, and performance monitoring.

name: angular-architect
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Angular architect mastering Angular 15+ with enterprise patterns. Specializes in RxJS, NgRx state management, micro-frontend architecture, and performance optimization with focus on building scalable enterprise applications.
description_zh: 该技能为构建Angular 15+企业级应用提供专家指导。涵盖架构规划、RxJS模式、NgRx状态管理和性能优化，配有具体检查清单，并与Nx、Jest、Cypress等工具集成。适用于需要结构化Angular开发流程的团队。
_original_description: This skill provides expert guidance for building Angular 15+ enterprise applications. It covers architecture planning, RxJS patterns, NgRx state management, and performance optimization with specific checklists and integration with tools like Nx, Jest, and Cypress. It's designed for teams needing structured Angular development workflows.

name: api-designer
author: zenobi-us
description: API architecture expert designing scalable, developer-friendly interfaces. Creates REST and GraphQL APIs with comprehensive documentation, focusing on consistency, performance, and developer experience.
description_zh: 该技能提供了一个用于设计REST和GraphQL API的结构化框架，涵盖规范、文档和开发者体验。包含RESTful原则、GraphQL模式设计、版本控制和身份验证的检查清单。集成了openapi-generator和postman等工具用于生成规范和测试。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured framework for designing REST and GraphQL APIs, covering specification, documentation, and developer experience. It includes checklists for RESTful principles, GraphQL schema design, versioning, and authentication. The skill integrates with tools like openapi-generator and postman for spec generation and testing.

name: api-documenter
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert API documenter specializing in creating comprehensive, developer-friendly API documentation. Masters OpenAPI/Swagger specifications, interactive documentation portals, and documentation automation with focus on clarity, completeness, and exceptional developer experience.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构良好的API文档技能，出色地涵盖了文档类型、交互功能及开发者体验考量。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured API documentation skill with excellent coverage of documentation types, interactive features, and developer experience considerations.

name: architect-reviewer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert architecture reviewer specializing in system design validation, architectural patterns, and technical decision assessment. Masters scalability analysis, technology stack evaluation, and evolutionary architecture with focus on maintainability and long-term viability.
description_zh: 一个全面的架构审查技能，包含系统化的评估框架，涵盖设计模式、可扩展性、安全性和技术债务评估，用于可持续的系统开发。
_original_description: A comprehensive architecture review skill with systematic evaluation frameworks covering design patterns, scalability, security, and technical debt assessment for sustainable system development.

name: ast-grep-code-analysis
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when analyzing complex codebases for security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and structural patterns - provides systematic AST-based approach using ast-grep for comprehensive code understanding beyond manual inspection
description_zh: 使用ast-grep工具提供代码分析模式，可检测安全漏洞、性能问题和结构缺陷。包含可立即使用的YAML规则模板，覆盖硬编码密钥、不安全令牌、React钩子依赖和深度嵌套等常见问题。演示了手动检查与自动模式匹配的对比效果。
_original_description: Provides concrete ast-grep patterns for detecting security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and structural problems in code. Includes ready-to-use YAML rules for hardcoded secrets, insecure tokens, React hook dependencies, and deep nesting. Shows before/after comparisons with manual vs automated inspection.

name: blockchain-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert blockchain developer specializing in smart contract development, DApp architecture, and DeFi protocols. Masters Solidity, Web3 integration, and blockchain security with focus on building secure, gas-efficient, and innovative decentralized applications.
description_zh: 一个全面的区块链开发技能，涵盖智能合约、DeFi协议、安全模式和Gas优化，结构清晰，集成点明确。
_original_description: A comprehensive blockchain development skill with extensive coverage of smart contracts, DeFi protocols, security patterns, and gas optimization. Well-structured with clear workflows and integration points.

name: brainstorming
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when creating or developing, before writing code or implementation plans - refines rough ideas into fully-formed designs through collaborative questioning, alternative exploration, and incremental validation. Don't use during clear 'mechanical' processes
description_zh: 一个结构良好的技能，通过渐进式提问和验证，引导协作式创意提炼为具体设计方案，在项目早期规划阶段尤其有价值。
_original_description: A well-structured skill that guides collaborative idea refinement into concrete designs through incremental questioning and validation, particularly valuable for early-stage project planning.

name: build-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert build engineer specializing in build system optimization, compilation strategies, and developer productivity. Masters modern build tools, caching mechanisms, and creating fast, reliable build pipelines that scale with team growth.
description_zh: 该技能扮演专业的构建工程师角色，专注于减少编译时间和优化开发者工作流。它提供了分析构建瓶颈、配置Webpack和Turbo等工具以及实施缓存策略的结构化指导。技能包含具体的性能目标清单，并概述了与其他开发角色的集成点。
_original_description: This skill acts as a specialized build engineer, focusing on reducing compilation times and improving developer workflows. It provides structured guidance for analyzing build bottlenecks, configuring tools like webpack and Turbo, and implementing caching strategies. The skill includes specific checklists for performance targets and outlines integration points with other development roles.

name: business-analyst
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert business analyst specializing in requirements gathering, process improvement, and data-driven decision making. Masters stakeholder management, business process modeling, and solution design with focus on delivering measurable business value.
description_zh: 一个全面的业务分析师技能，具有结构化工作流程、广泛的方法论覆盖和清晰的沟通协议，能有效连接业务与技术领域。
_original_description: A comprehensive business analyst skill with structured workflows, extensive methodology coverage, and clear communication protocols for bridging business and technical domains effectively.

name: chaos-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert chaos engineer specializing in controlled failure injection, resilience testing, and building antifragile systems. Masters chaos experiments, game day planning, and continuous resilience improvement with focus on learning from failure.
description_zh: 协助工程师规划和执行受控混沌实验以测试系统弹性的技能。提供结构化的工作流程，涵盖故障注入、影响范围控制和实验后分析，支持 chaostoolkit 和 litmus 等工具。
_original_description: A skill that assists engineers in planning and executing controlled chaos experiments to test system resilience. Provides structured workflows for failure injection, blast radius control, and post-experiment analysis using tools like chaostoolkit and litmus.

name: checking-files-with-lsp
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when you need to check, verify, validate or understand code or structure of a file (often code related files or markdown) - automatically detects file type, finds appropriate LSP/linter in mise, and runs validation
description_zh: 一个结构良好的技能，通过mise自动化使用LSP/linter工具进行文件验证，提供清晰的工作流程、智能工具选择和备用方案。
_original_description: A well-structured skill that automates file validation using LSP/linter tools via mise, offering clear workflows, smart tool selection, and fallback options for developers.

name: chrome-debug
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when debugging web applications in chrome via the remote debugging protocol. Provides capabilities for inspecting DOM, executing JS, taking screenshots, and automating browser interactions.
description_zh: 该技能通过Chrome DevTools协议实现浏览器自动化、调试和测试。提供DOM检查、JavaScript执行、截图捕获、表单填充和性能分析等工具。文档包含常见调试工作流和自动化任务的具体示例。
_original_description: This skill enables direct interaction with Chrome DevTools Protocol for browser automation, debugging, and testing. It provides tools for DOM inspection, JavaScript execution, screenshot capture, form filling, and performance analysis. The documentation includes concrete examples for common debugging workflows and automation tasks.

name: cli-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert CLI developer specializing in command-line interface design, developer tools, and terminal applications. Masters user experience, cross-platform compatibility, and building efficient CLI tools that developers love to use.
description_zh: 一个专业的CLI开发助手，专注于设计和构建命令行界面。提供参数解析、交互式提示、进度指示器和跨平台兼容性的结构化工作流程。关注开发者体验，设定具体性能目标，如启动时间<50毫秒和内存使用监控。
_original_description: A specialized CLI development assistant that helps design and build command-line interfaces. It provides structured workflows for argument parsing, interactive prompts, progress indicators, and cross-platform compatibility. Focuses on developer experience with specific performance targets like <50ms startup time and memory usage monitoring.

name: cloud-architect
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert cloud architect specializing in multi-cloud strategies, scalable architectures, and cost-effective solutions. Masters AWS, Azure, and GCP with focus on security, performance, and compliance while designing resilient cloud-native systems.
description_zh: 一个云架构师技能，使用AWS、Azure和GCP设计多云解决方案。遵循从发现到实施的结构化工作流程，专注于成本降低、安全性和合规性。集成Terraform和kubectl等工具进行基础设施管理。
_original_description: A cloud architect skill that designs multi-cloud solutions using AWS, Azure, and GCP. It follows a structured workflow from discovery to implementation, focusing on cost reduction, security, and compliance. Integrates with tools like Terraform and kubectl for infrastructure management.

name: competitive-analyst
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert competitive analyst specializing in competitor intelligence, strategic analysis, and market positioning. Masters competitive benchmarking, SWOT analysis, and strategic recommendations with focus on creating sustainable competitive advantages.
description_zh: 一个专门用于收集和分析竞争对手数据的智能体，使用SimilarWeb、SEMrush和Crunchbase等工具。它遵循从情报规划到战略建议的结构化工作流程，专注于SWOT分析和市场定位。
_original_description: A specialized agent for gathering and analyzing competitor data using tools like SimilarWeb, SEMrush, and Crunchbase. It follows a structured workflow from intelligence planning to strategic recommendations, focusing on SWOT analysis and market positioning.

name: compliance-auditor
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert compliance auditor specializing in regulatory frameworks, data privacy laws, and security standards. Masters GDPR, HIPAA, PCI DSS, SOC 2, and ISO certifications with focus on automated compliance validation and continuous monitoring.
description_zh: 该技能通过集成Prowler、Checkov等工具，自动化执行GDPR、HIPAA、PCI DSS等主要法规的合规审计。它提供结构化的差距分析、证据收集和报告生成工作流，将人工审计准备时间从数月缩短至数周。
_original_description: This skill automates compliance auditing for major regulations like GDPR, HIPAA, and PCI DSS by integrating tools like Prowler and Checkov. It provides structured workflows for gap analysis, evidence collection, and reporting, reducing manual audit preparation time from months to weeks.

name: content-marketer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert content marketer specializing in content strategy, SEO optimization, and engagement-driven marketing. Masters multi-channel content creation, analytics, and conversion optimization with focus on building brand authority and driving measurable business results.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构良好的内容营销专家技能，具备清晰的工作流程、实用的检查清单，并与营销工具集成，旨在实现可衡量的业务成果。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured content marketing expert skill with clear workflows, practical checklists, and integration with marketing tools for measurable business results.

name: context-manager
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert context manager specializing in information storage, retrieval, and synchronization across multi-agent systems. Masters state management, version control, and data lifecycle with focus on ensuring consistency, accessibility, and performance at scale.
description_zh: 该技能用于管理多个AI代理之间的共享状态和上下文，专注于快速检索（<100毫秒）、强一致性和安全存储。它集成了Redis、Elasticsearch和向量数据库，处理项目元数据、任务历史和代理交互。技能提供了架构分析、实施和监控分布式上下文系统的结构化工作流程。
_original_description: This skill manages shared state and context across multiple AI agents, focusing on fast retrieval (<100ms), strong consistency, and secure storage. It integrates with Redis, Elasticsearch, and vector databases to handle project metadata, task history, and agent interactions. The skill provides structured workflows for architecture analysis, implementation, and monitoring of distributed context systems.

name: cpp-pro
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert C++ developer specializing in modern C++20/23, systems programming, and high-performance computing. Masters template metaprogramming, zero-overhead abstractions, and low-level optimization with emphasis on safety and efficiency.
description_zh: 全面的C++专家技能，涵盖现代C++20/23特性、性能优化技术和系统编程模式，具有清晰的工作流程和集成能力。
_original_description: Comprehensive C++ expert skill with extensive coverage of modern C++20/23 features, performance optimization techniques, and systems programming patterns. Well-structured workflow with clear development phases and integration capabilities.

name: csharp-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert C# developer specializing in modern .NET development, ASP.NET Core, and cloud-native applications. Masters C# 12 features, Blazor, and cross-platform development with emphasis on performance and clean architecture.
description_zh: 一个全面且专业的C#/.NET专家技能，深度覆盖现代开发实践、云原生模式和性能优化技术，适合企业级应用开发。
_original_description: A comprehensive C#/.NET expert skill with extensive coverage of modern development practices, cloud-native patterns, and performance optimization techniques for enterprise applications.

name: customer-success-manager
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert customer success manager specializing in customer retention, growth, and advocacy. Masters account health monitoring, strategic relationship building, and driving customer value realization to maximize satisfaction and revenue growth.
description_zh: 一个全面的客户成功管理技能，具有结构化工作流程、清晰的成功指标，并与关键业务工具集成，用于推动客户留存和增长。
_original_description: A comprehensive customer success management skill with structured workflows, clear success metrics, and integration with key business tools for driving retention and growth.

name: data-analyst
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert data analyst specializing in business intelligence, data visualization, and statistical analysis. Masters SQL, Python, and BI tools to transform raw data into actionable insights with focus on stakeholder communication and business impact.
description_zh: 一个数据分析师技能，提供SQL查询、仪表板创建和统计分析的结构化工作流。包含数据质量检查、可视化设计和利益相关者沟通的具体清单。该技能集成了Tableau、Power BI和dbt等工具，用于交付可操作的业务洞察。
_original_description: A data analyst skill that provides structured workflows for SQL querying, dashboard creation, and statistical analysis. It includes specific checklists for data quality, visualization design, and stakeholder communication. The skill integrates with tools like Tableau, Power BI, and dbt to deliver actionable business insights.

name: data-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert data engineer specializing in building scalable data pipelines, ETL/ELT processes, and data infrastructure. Masters big data technologies and cloud platforms with focus on reliable, efficient, and cost-optimized data platforms.
description_zh: 一个专注于设计和实施数据管道与基础设施的专家代理。涵盖ETL/ELT流程、数据湖/仓库设计、流处理及成本优化，使用Spark、Airflow、dbt、Kafka、Snowflake和Databricks等工具。遵循从架构分析到实施的系统化工作流程。
_original_description: A specialized agent for designing and implementing data pipelines and infrastructure. It covers ETL/ELT processes, data lake/warehouse design, stream processing, and cost optimization using tools like Spark, Airflow, dbt, Kafka, Snowflake, and Databricks. It follows a structured workflow from architecture analysis to implementation.

name: data-researcher
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert data researcher specializing in discovering, collecting, and analyzing diverse data sources. Masters data mining, statistical analysis, and pattern recognition with focus on extracting meaningful insights from complex datasets to support evidence-based decisions.
description_zh: 该技能提供结构化数据研究工作流，整合SQL、Python和网络搜索功能。采用从数据规划到可视化的系统方法，通过清单驱动确保数据质量和分析可重复性。
_original_description: This skill provides structured data research workflows with SQL, Python, and web search capabilities. It follows a systematic approach from data planning to visualization, integrating multiple MCP tools for comprehensive data tasks. The checklist-driven methodology ensures quality and reproducibility.

name: data-scientist
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert data scientist specializing in statistical analysis, machine learning, and business insights. Masters exploratory data analysis, predictive modeling, and data storytelling with focus on delivering actionable insights that drive business value.
description_zh: 一个全面的数据科学专家技能，涵盖EDA、统计建模、机器学习和业务沟通，结构良好但实现细节较为通用。
_original_description: A comprehensive data science expert skill with well-structured methodology covering EDA, statistical modeling, machine learning, and business communication, though somewhat generic in implementation details.

name: database-administrator
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert database administrator specializing in high-availability systems, performance optimization, and disaster recovery. Masters PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and Redis with focus on reliability, scalability, and operational excellence.
description_zh: 该技能提供PostgreSQL、MySQL、MongoDB和Redis的专家级数据库管理。涵盖安装、配置、性能调优、高可用性设置、备份策略和监控。包含psql、mysql、pg_dump等具体命令用于直接操作数据库。
_original_description: This skill provides expert database administration for PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and Redis. It handles installation, configuration, performance tuning, high-availability setups, backup strategies, and monitoring. The tool includes specific commands like psql, mysql, and pg_dump for direct database operations.

name: database-optimizer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert database optimizer specializing in query optimization, performance tuning, and scalability across multiple database systems. Masters execution plan analysis, index strategies, and system-level optimizations with focus on achieving peak database performance.
description_zh: 一个全面的数据库优化技能，涵盖多种数据库系统的性能调优技术，具有结构化的工作流程和实用的工具集成。
_original_description: A comprehensive database optimization skill with extensive coverage of performance tuning techniques across multiple database systems, featuring structured workflows and practical tool integration.

name: debugger
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert debugger specializing in complex issue diagnosis, root cause analysis, and systematic problem-solving. Masters debugging tools, techniques, and methodologies across multiple languages and environments with focus on efficient issue resolution.
description_zh: 一个专业的调试代理，提供结构化工作流来诊断复杂软件问题。它集成了多种调试工具（gdb、strace、tcpdump），并遵循系统化的根本原因分析、内存调试和性能分析方法。该技能强调可复现步骤和知识记录。
_original_description: A specialized debugging agent that provides structured workflows for diagnosing complex software issues. It integrates multiple debugging tools (gdb, strace, tcpdump) and follows systematic approaches for root cause analysis, memory debugging, and performance profiling. The skill emphasizes reproducible steps and knowledge capture.

name: deep-research
author: zenobi-us
description: Use this agent when delegating research tasks that require collecting and verifying beyond surface-level sources. The agent crawls, collates, verifies, and fact-checks information, providing evidence of its verification process.
description_zh: 一个具有严谨方法论的研究代理，用于系统化信息收集、验证和结构化文档生成。
_original_description: A comprehensive research agent with rigorous methodology for systematic information gathering, verification, and structured documentation.

name: deep-researcher
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when delegating research tasks requiring verified information from multiple authoritative sources - crawls and fact-checks beyond surface-level findings, providing evidence of verification process with confidence levels for each claim
description_zh: 该技能强制要求系统性研究，必须验证3个以上独立来源。它拒绝模糊请求，记录包含URL和访问日期的证据链，并输出结构化Markdown文件。方法包括置信度评分并透明处理来源矛盾。
_original_description: This skill enforces systematic research with mandatory verification from 3+ independent sources. It rejects vague requests, documents evidence trails with URLs and access dates, and outputs structured markdown files. The methodology includes confidence scoring and handles source contradictions transparently.

name: dependency-manager
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert dependency manager specializing in package management, security auditing, and version conflict resolution across multiple ecosystems. Masters dependency optimization, supply chain security, and automated updates with focus on maintaining stable, secure, and efficient dependency trees.
description_zh: 一个专门管理多包管理器生态（npm、pip、Maven等）依赖关系的智能体。它能扫描漏洞、解决版本冲突、更新依赖包并优化依赖树。核心关注安全合规、构建性能和自动化流程。
_original_description: A specialized agent for managing dependencies across multiple package ecosystems (npm, pip, Maven, etc.). It scans for vulnerabilities, resolves version conflicts, updates packages, and optimizes dependency trees. Focuses on security compliance, build performance, and automated workflows.

name: deployment-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert deployment engineer specializing in CI/CD pipelines, release automation, and deployment strategies. Masters blue-green, canary, and rolling deployments with focus on zero-downtime releases and rapid rollback capabilities.
description_zh: 该技能为实施和优化CI/CD流水线提供结构化指导。涵盖蓝绿部署和金丝雀发布等策略，集成Jenkins和ArgoCD等工具，包含部署频率和交付周期等指标检查清单。重点实现自动回滚和确保零停机发布。
_original_description: This skill provides structured guidance for implementing and optimizing CI/CD pipelines. It covers deployment strategies like blue-green and canary, integrates with tools like Jenkins and ArgoCD, and includes checklists for metrics like deployment frequency and lead time. It focuses on automating rollbacks and ensuring zero-downtime releases.

name: devops-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert DevOps engineer bridging development and operations with comprehensive automation, monitoring, and infrastructure management. Masters CI/CD, containerization, and cloud platforms with focus on culture, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
description_zh: 一个全面的DevOps专家技能，涵盖基础设施自动化、CI/CD、容器化、监控和团队协作，具有结构化工作流程和集成能力。
_original_description: A comprehensive DevOps expert skill covering infrastructure automation, CI/CD, containerization, monitoring, and team collaboration with structured workflows and integration capabilities.

name: dispatching-parallel-agents
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when facing 3+ independent failures that can be investigated without shared state or dependencies - dispatches multiple Claude agents to investigate and fix independent problems concurrently
description_zh: 该技能提供了一种模式，用于分派多个Claude代理并发调查独立的测试失败或bug。包含明确的使用标准、示例提示和实际调试场景，展示了并行调查节省的时间。
_original_description: This skill provides a pattern for dispatching multiple Claude agents to investigate independent test failures or bugs concurrently. It includes clear criteria for when to use parallel agents, example prompts, and real debugging scenarios showing time savings from parallel investigations.

name: django-developer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Django developer mastering Django 4+ with modern Python practices. Specializes in scalable web applications, REST API development, async views, and enterprise patterns with focus on rapid development and security best practices.
description_zh: 该技能为Django 4+开发提供系统性工作流，涵盖架构设计、ORM优化、REST API创建、异步视图和安全。包含测试、性能检查清单，并集成pytest、Celery和Docker等工具，指导全栈项目开发。
_original_description: This skill provides a systematic workflow for Django 4+ development, covering architecture, ORM optimization, REST API creation, async views, and security. It includes checklists for testing, performance, and integrates with tools like pytest, Celery, and Docker for full-stack project guidance.

name: documentation-engineer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert documentation engineer specializing in technical documentation systems, API documentation, and developer-friendly content. Masters documentation-as-code, automated generation, and creating maintainable documentation that developers actually use.
description_zh: 一个专注于技术文档系统的专家代理。它处理API文档、教程和参考指南，支持Markdown、AsciiDoc、Sphinx、MkDocs、Docusaurus和Swagger等工具。重点在于自动化文档生成、保持一致性并改善开发者上手体验。
_original_description: A specialized agent for managing technical documentation systems. It handles API docs, tutorials, and reference guides with tools for markdown, AsciiDoc, Sphinx, MkDocs, Docusaurus, and Swagger. Focuses on automating documentation generation, maintaining consistency, and improving developer onboarding.

name: dotnet-core-expert
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert .NET Core specialist mastering .NET 8 with modern C# features. Specializes in cross-platform development, minimal APIs, cloud-native applications, and microservices with focus on building high-performance, scalable solutions.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构良好的.NET Core专家技能，详细指导现代.NET 8开发，出色涵盖了架构模式、性能优化和云原生实践。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured .NET Core expert skill that provides detailed guidance on modern .NET 8 development with excellent coverage of architecture patterns, performance optimization, and cloud-native practices.

name: dotnet-framework-4-8-expert
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert .NET Framework 4.8 specialist mastering legacy enterprise applications. Specializes in Windows-based development, Web Forms, WCF services, and Windows services with focus on maintaining and modernizing existing enterprise solutions.
description_zh: 一个全面且结构良好的 .NET Framework 4.8 专家技能，专注于遗留系统的维护和现代化，在 Web Forms、WCF、Windows 服务和企业模式方面提供详细指导，并强调稳定性和向后兼容性。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured expert skill for .NET Framework 4.8 legacy system maintenance and modernization, offering detailed guidance across Web Forms, WCF, Windows services, and enterprise patterns with strong emphasis on stability and backward compatibility.

name: dx-optimizer
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert developer experience optimizer specializing in build performance, tooling efficiency, and workflow automation. Masters development environment optimization with focus on reducing friction, accelerating feedback loops, and maximizing developer productivity and satisfaction.
description_zh: 该技能专注于分析和优化开发者体验，通过检查构建时间、工具效率和自动化流程来提升开发效率。它提供了具体的性能指标清单，并集成多种构建工具来实施优化方案。
_original_description: This skill analyzes and optimizes developer experience by focusing on build times, tooling efficiency, and workflow automation. It provides concrete checklists for build performance, HMR latency, and test execution, and integrates with multiple build tools like webpack, vite, and turbo to implement improvements.

name: electron-pro
author: zenobi-us
description: Desktop application specialist building secure cross-platform solutions. Develops Electron apps with native OS integration, focusing on security, performance, and seamless user experience.
description_zh: 为构建跨平台（Windows、macOS、Linux）的安全Electron桌面应用提供结构化工作流。专注于安全最佳实践、原生操作系统集成、性能目标和分发流程。包含架构设计、安全实现和打包分发的具体检查清单及通信协议。
_original_description: Provides a structured workflow for building secure Electron desktop apps across Windows, macOS, and Linux. Focuses on security best practices, native OS integration, performance targets, and distribution. Includes specific checklists for architecture, implementation, and packaging with defined communication protocols.

name: embedded-systems
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert embedded systems engineer specializing in microcontroller programming, RTOS development, and hardware optimization. Masters low-level programming, real-time constraints, and resource-limited environments with focus on reliability, efficiency, and hardware-software integration.
description_zh: 该技能为嵌入式系统开发提供结构化指导，涵盖微控制器编程、RTOS实现和硬件优化。包含代码大小、RAM使用和中断延迟的具体检查清单。集成了ARM GCC、PlatformIO和ESP-IDF工具链用于实际固件开发。
_original_description: This skill provides structured guidance for embedded systems development, covering microcontroller programming, RTOS implementation, and hardware optimization. It includes specific checklists for code size, RAM usage, and interrupt latency. The skill integrates with ARM GCC, PlatformIO, and ESP-IDF toolchains for practical firmware development.

name: error-coordinator
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert error coordinator specializing in distributed error handling, failure recovery, and system resilience. Masters error correlation, cascade prevention, and automated recovery strategies across multi-agent systems with focus on minimizing impact and learning from failures.
description_zh: 一个专注于分布式系统弹性的全面错误协调技能，提供结构化的错误处理流程、监控工具集成和系统化的恢复策略。
_original_description: A comprehensive error coordination skill with strong focus on distributed system resilience, offering structured error handling workflows, integration with monitoring tools, and systematic recovery strategies.

name: error-detective
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert error detective specializing in complex error pattern analysis, correlation, and root cause discovery. Masters distributed system debugging, error tracking, and anomaly detection with focus on finding hidden connections and preventing error cascades.
description_zh: 一个专门用于调查分布式系统中复杂错误的智能体。它提供结构化的日志关联、模式分析和根因定位工作流，使用Elasticsearch和Splunk等工具。专注于跨服务关联错误症状，防止级联故障。
_original_description: A specialized agent for investigating complex errors in distributed systems. It provides structured workflows for log correlation, pattern analysis, and root cause discovery using tools like Elasticsearch and Splunk. Focuses on connecting error symptoms across services to prevent cascading failures.

name: examples
author: zenobi-us
description: Real-world examples of Conventional Commits for different scenarios and commit types.
description_zh: 一个全面的参考技能，提供各种场景、提交类型和常见错误下的Conventional Commits真实示例，是开发团队优秀的规范性教育资源。
_original_description: A comprehensive reference skill providing real-world examples of Conventional Commits across various scenarios, commit types, and common mistakes, serving as an excellent educational resource for development teams.

name: executing-tasks-from-any-source
author: zenobi-us
description: Execute tasks from both GitHub issues and Basic Memory artifacts using unified workflow - supports intelligent source detection and dual-channel status management
description_zh: 该技能为从GitHub issues和Basic Memory artifacts执行任务提供了统一接口。它能自动检测来源格式、获取任务详情、创建git worktree，并在相应系统中更新任务状态。工作流处理依赖检查，并在两个平台间保持状态一致性。
_original_description: This skill provides a unified interface for executing tasks from both GitHub issues and Basic Memory artifacts. It automatically detects the source format, fetches task details, creates git worktrees, and updates task status in the appropriate system. The workflow handles dependency checking and maintains consistent status across both platforms.

name: faq
author: zenobi-us
description: Frequently asked questions and practical guidance for implementing Conventional Commits in your workflow.
description_zh: 该技能提供了关于Conventional Commits的详细FAQ，涵盖格式规范、工作流集成、工具支持和常见问题解答，是开发者采用此提交信息标准的实用参考指南。
_original_description: This skill provides a detailed FAQ for implementing Conventional Commits, covering common questions about formatting, workflow integration, tooling, and troubleshooting. It serves as a quick reference guide for developers adopting this commit message standard.

name: figma
author: zenobi-us
description: Use when design, prototyping or referencing Figma files. Provides capabilities for inspecting design elements, extracting assets, generating code from designs, and managing Code Connect mappings via the figma-desktop MCP server.
description_zh: 一个具有潜力的Figma自动化技能，但文档严重缺失，功能描述不清，实现细节不完整。
_original_description: A Figma automation skill with potential value for designers, but severely lacking in documentation, unclear functionality, and incomplete implementation details.

name: firefox-debug
author: zenobi-us
description: Integrate Firefox Remote Debugging Protocol (RDP) for development workflows via mcporter.
description_zh: 一个全面的Firefox远程调试协议集成技能，通过MCP实现浏览器自动化测试、调试和交互，文档完善且示例实用。
_original_description: A comprehensive Firefox Remote Debugging Protocol integration skill that enables automated browser testing, debugging, and interaction through MCP, with excellent documentation and practical examples.

name: flutter-expert
author: zenobi-us
description: Expert Flutter specialist mastering Flutter 3+ with modern architecture patterns. Specializes in cross-platform development, custom animations, native integrations, and performance optimization with focus on creating beautiful, native-performance applications.
description_zh: 一个Flutter开发助手，指导使用Flutter 3+进行移动应用开发。提供架构规划、实现和测试的结构化工作流。包含性能、组件组合和平台特定功能的检查清单。集成了Android Studio、Xcode和Firebase等工具进行全栈开发。
_original_description: A Flutter development assistant that guides mobile app creation using Flutter 3+. It provides structured workflows for architecture planning, implementation, and testing. The skill includes checklists for performance, widget composition, and platform-specific features. It integrates with tools like Android Studio, Xcode, and Firebase for full-stack development.
